# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  labels:
    istio-injection: enabled
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh
  annotations:
    description: "Namespace for microservices with Istio service mesh"

---
# API Gateway - Istio sidecar injection enabled
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
    version: v1
    mesh: istio
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "API Gateway with Istio sidecar proxy enabled"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: api-gateway
        version: v1
      annotations:
        # Enable Istio sidecar proxy injection for this deployment
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        # Configure sidecar proxy resource limits
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "500m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "256Mi"
        # Configure proxy log level for debugging
        sidecar.istio.io/logLevel: "warning"
        # Define inbound ports to intercept
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "8080"
        # Exclude health check port from interception
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeInboundPorts: "8081"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: api-gateway-sa
      containers:
        - name: api-gateway
          image: myregistry/api-gateway:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 8081
              name: health
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "api-gateway"
            - name: UPSTREAM_SERVICE
              value: "http://user-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local:8080"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "100m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "256Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5

---
# User Service - Istio sidecar injection enabled with custom configuration
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service
    version: v1
    mesh: istio
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "User Service with Istio sidecar proxy enabled"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: user-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        # Enable Istio sidecar proxy injection
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        # Configure sidecar proxy resources
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "150m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "192Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "600m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "384Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/logLevel: "info"
        # Include specific inbound ports for traffic interception
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "8080,9090"
        # Exclude outbound traffic to external database
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundIPRanges: "10.0.10.0/24"
        # Enable access logging for this service
        sidecar.istio.io/componentLogLevel: "misc:error,rbac:debug,filter:warning"
        # Hold application start until proxy is ready
        proxy.istio.io/config: |
          holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
          concurrency: 2
          proxyStatsMatcher:
            inclusionRegexps:
              - ".*upstream_rq_.*"
              - ".*downstream_rq_.*"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: user-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: user-service
          image: myregistry/user-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 9090
              name: grpc
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "user-service"
            - name: DB_HOST
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: user-service-db-secret
                  key: host
            - name: DB_PORT
              value: "5432"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 5

---
# Order Service - Istio sidecar injection enabled with outbound traffic control
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
    version: v1
    mesh: istio
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Order Service with Istio sidecar proxy and outbound traffic management"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: order-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        # Enable Istio sidecar proxy injection
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "200m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "256Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "800m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "512Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/logLevel: "warning"
        # Only allow outbound traffic to specific service CIDR ranges
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeOutboundIPRanges: "10.96.0.0/12"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "8080"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeInboundPorts: "15020"
        # Rewrite HTTP probes to work with mTLS
        sidecar.istio.io/rewriteAppHTTPProbers: "true"
        # Custom proxy configuration
        proxy.istio.io/config: |
          holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
          terminationDrainDuration: 30s
          concurrency: 2
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: order-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: order-service
          image: myregistry/order-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "order-service"
            - name: USER_SERVICE_URL
              value: "http://user-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local:8080"
            - name: PAYMENT_SERVICE_URL
              value: "http://payment-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local:8080"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 5

---
# Payment Service - Istio sidecar injection DISABLED (external legacy service)
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: payment-service-legacy
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service-legacy
    version: v1
    mesh: none
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Legacy Payment Service - Istio sidecar proxy DISABLED for backward compatibility"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service-legacy
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: payment-service-legacy
        version: v1
      annotations:
        # Explicitly DISABLE Istio sidecar proxy injection for this legacy service
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: payment-service-legacy-sa
      containers:
        - name: payment-service-legacy
          image: myregistry/payment-service-legacy:2.3.1
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "payment-service-legacy"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "100m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "256Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5

---
# Payment Service v2 - Istio sidecar injection enabled (modern replacement)
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
    version: v2
    mesh: istio
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Modern Payment Service with Istio sidecar proxy enabled"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
      version: v2
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: payment-service
        version: v2
      annotations:
        # Enable Istio sidecar proxy injection
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "200m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "256Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "1000m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "512Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/logLevel: "info"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "8080"
        # Exclude external payment gateway IPs from proxy
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundIPRanges: "203.0.113.0/24,198.51.100.0/24"
        # Exclude external payment gateway ports
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundPorts: "443"
        sidecar.istio.io/rewriteAppHTTPProbers: "true"
        proxy.istio.io/config: |
          holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
          terminationDrainDuration: 45s
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: payment-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: payment-service
          image: myregistry/payment-service:2.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "payment-service"
            - name: PAYMENT_GATEWAY_URL
              valueFrom:
                configMapKeyRef:
                  name: payment-service-config
                  key: gateway-url
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 5

---
# Notification Service - Istio sidecar injection enabled with custom init container
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
    version: v1
    mesh: istio
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Notification Service with Istio sidecar proxy and custom interception rules"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: notification-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        # Enable Istio sidecar proxy injection
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "400m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "256Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/logLevel: "warning"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "8080"
        # Exclude SMTP and external notification provider ports
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundPorts: "587,465,2525"
        sidecar.istio.io/rewriteAppHTTPProbers: "true"
        # Customize the interception mode
        sidecar.istio.io/interceptionMode: "REDIRECT"
        proxy.istio.io/config: |
          holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
          concurrency: 1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: notification-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: notification-service
          image: myregistry/notification-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "notification-service"
            - name: SMTP_HOST
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: notification-service-smtp-secret
                  key: host
            - name: SMTP_PORT
              value: "587"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "100m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "256Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5

---
# Monitoring/Debug Service - Istio sidecar DISABLED for observability tooling
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: debug-tools
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: debug-tools
    version: v1
    mesh: none
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Debug tools deployment - Istio sidecar proxy DISABLED to avoid traffic interception"
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: debug-tools
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: debug-tools
        version: v1
      annotations:
        # Explicitly DISABLE Istio sidecar proxy injection for debugging purposes
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: debug-tools-sa
      containers:
        - name: debug-tools
          image: myregistry/debug-tools:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "50m"
              memory: "64Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "128Mi"

---
# Service Accounts
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: api-gateway

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: user-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: order-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: payment-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: payment-service-legacy-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service-legacy

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: notification-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: debug-tools-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: debug-tools

---
# Kubernetes Services for mesh routing
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  selector:
    app: api-gateway
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: user-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
    - name: grpc
      port: 9090
      targetPort: 9090
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: order-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: payment-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: payment-service-legacy
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service-legacy
spec:
  selector:
    app: payment-service-legacy
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: notification-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
